_comment: Shared Claude Code config baseline for this repo. .claude/settings.json is gitignored (machine-local + OS-specific hook commands), so deny-lists and standard env can't propagate to fresh clones. This committed template carries the OS-agnostic, clearly-shareable parts; `python scripts/setup_claude_settings.py --apply` merges them into your local .claude/settings.json without clobbering local keys (allow-list, defaultMode, OS-specific hooks). Basis: docs/audits/2026-06-24-sdlc-vibe-coding-claude-best-practices-adoption.md (R5/R6/R7). Two opt-in hooks ARE included below (ruff_autofix_on_write [PostToolUse], session_reflection_nudge [SessionEnd]); their commands are PowerShell-shaped, so a non-Windows operator should adjust shell/command. The pre-existing FUSE/team/feed hooks remain wired only in local settings.json -- their cross-platform propagation is still a host/DRI call.
